description: Wave 0 - M01 Hybrid App Mock: Create React/TypeScript frontend scaffold with mock API, role-based routing (User/Operator/Maintainer), and basic status display. Branch: feat/m01-hybrid-app-mock
steps: Create branch feat/m01-hybrid-app-mock from main
Create apps/frontend/package.json with React, TypeScript dependencies (note: no npm install possible, create structure only with source files)
Create apps/frontend/tsconfig.json
Create apps/frontend/src/index.tsx entry point
Create apps/frontend/src/App.tsx with role-based routing
Create apps/frontend/src/types/api.ts with TypeScript interfaces matching contracts (EventEnvelope, OccupancyState, EquipmentState, SafetyDecision)
Create apps/frontend/src/types/roles.ts with USER, OPERATOR, MAINTAINER role types
Create apps/frontend/src/mocks/mockApi.ts with mock data returning simulated zone states, events, equipment states
Create apps/frontend/src/components/StatusPanel.tsx showing zone occupancy states with safety colors
Create apps/frontend/src/components/EventList.tsx showing recent events
Create apps/frontend/src/components/EquipmentStatus.tsx showing equipment states
Create apps/frontend/src/pages/UserView.tsx with read-only status display
Create apps/frontend/src/pages/OperatorView.tsx with event ACK/resolve capability
Create apps/frontend/src/pages/MaintainerView.tsx with diagnostic display
Create apps/frontend/src/adapters/localAdapter.ts interface for Gateway API calls
Create apps/frontend/src/adapters/mockAdapter.ts implementing localAdapter with mock data
Ensure TypeScript types correctly reference OCCUPIED, VACANT_PENDING, VACANT_CONFIRMED, UNKNOWN, STALE states
Ensure UNKNOWN and STALE are never displayed as safe/vacant in components
Create apps/frontend/README.md documenting the mock app structure and how to run it
Commit all changes
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript source files compile without type errors (validated by manual review since no npm available)
Mock API returns data matching contracts/events/ schemas
UNKNOWN and STALE states are displayed with warning/danger styling, never as safe
User mode does not expose ACK, classify, I/O test, or settings
All JSON files pass make check-json
verification: TypeScript files have no syntax errors (verified by manual AST review)
